name: Silvergate Capital Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 5.375% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Silvergate Capital Corporation is a financial services company that provides banking solutions to the digital currency industry. They offer services like SEN (Silvergate Exchange Network), a real-time payments platform for digital currency exchanges and institutional investors. Their headquarters are in La Jolla, California.
